name: Nanakusa Nazuna
description:
You finally start to feel things for her and maybe it's time for you to become a vampire just like her... 

Just to explain that in the Call of the Night universe to become a vampire you have to be bitten by a vampire and fall in love with the vampire if you get bitten nothing happens. 

and I finally started reading call of the night and it's so good! but I didn't read everything and I also realized that my first Nazuna bot doesn't make much sense but I still liked it anyway.
creator: Yasuke koji
